creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I toyed with the 
    -r FreeBSD
workaround from bug 258268 comment 0. 


% /usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh -r FreeBSD upgrade
pkg -o ABI=FreeBSD:14:i386 -o INSTALL_AS_USER=true -o RUN_SCRIPTS=false --rootdir /home/grahamperrin/.i386-wine-pkg -r FreeBSD upgrade
pkg: Invalid rootdir: No such file or directory
%
